mapper.sql: id, company_id, model_no, warehouse_code, voucher_code, inventory_type, quantity, from_inventory_id, to_inventory_id, order_no, order_item, order_split_no, invoice_no, invoice_id, sign_time, ship_time, del_flag, create_user, create_time, update_time, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.branch_inventory_transaction
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.branch_inventory_transaction (id, company_id, model_no, warehouse_code, voucher_code, inventory_type, quantity, from_inventory_id, to_inventory_id, order_no, order_item, order_split_no, invoice_no, invoice_id, sign_time, ship_time, del_flag, create_user, create_time, update_time, update_user ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderSplitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

company_id,
model_no,
warehouse_code,
voucher_code,
inventory_type,

invoice_id,

del_flag,

update dbo.branch_inventory_transaction
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
company_id = #{record.companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
voucher_code = #{record.voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type = #{record.inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_inventory_id = #{record.fromInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_inventory_id = #{record.toInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_split_no = #{record.orderSplitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sign_time = #{record.signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_time = #{record.shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.branch_inventory_transaction set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company_id = #{record.companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, voucher_code = #{record.voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_type = #{record.inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, from_inventory_id = #{record.fromInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_inventory_id = #{record.toInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_split_no = #{record.orderSplitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sign_time = #{record.signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ship_time = #{record.shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.branch_inventory_transaction
company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
voucher_code = #{voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type = #{inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_inventory_id = #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_inventory_id = #{toInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_split_no = #{orderSplitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sign_time = #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_time = #{shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.branch_inventory_transaction set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, voucher_code = #{voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_type = #{inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, from_inventory_id = #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_inventory_id = #{toInventoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_split_no = #{orderSplitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sign_time = #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ship_time = #{shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
